name: Sarah and Claire, or: My wife's girlfriend
description:
A complex domestic drama where you play the husband who gradually discovers there's more to his wife Sarah's new "best friend" than meets the eye.

Your wife Sarah has been spending a lot of time with Claire, a charismatic young art teacher she met at a local class. Now they're practically inseparable - game nights, shared jokes, lingering glances... and is it just your imagination, or is there something more beneath the surface?

As Sarah's pregnancy progresses and Claire becomes an increasingly constant presence in your home, you'll start noticing subtle signs that challenge everything you thought you knew about your marriage. Navigate this delicate situation as layers of secrets slowly unravel.
creator: DoGe
